sections.paragraph:
Original: יצת

Transliteration: yâtsath

Phonetic: yaw-tsath'

BDB Definition:

  1. to kindle, burn, set on fire
    1. (Qal) to kindle
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to be kindled
      2. to be left desolate
    3. (Hiphil) to set on fire, kindle

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 899

Part(s) of speech: Verb
